title: leucas candicans
intro: Leucas candicans is a plant species that belongs to the family Lamiaceae and is commonly known as the "Wild Jasmine" or "Dhoop". It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Leucas candicans include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and managing stress and anxiety. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils that can be used to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
